assertions.title: Fresh boot diagnostics report ready state with no usable live snapshots

steps.expected: 200 response with readiness.state=ready and no available shared market snapshot on fresh :memory: boot with CCXT_EXCHANGES=''

assertions.title: Fresh boot simple price surfaces explicit service_unavailable envelopes

steps.expected: Explicit service_unavailable envelope instead of an empty object when no usable live snapshots exist
steps.observed: status 503; body={'error': 'service_unavailable', 'message': 'No usable live market snapshots are available for simple/price.'}

steps.expected: Explicit service_unavailable envelope instead of an empty object when no usable live snapshots exist
steps.observed: status 503; body={'error': 'service_unavailable', 'message': 'No usable live market snapshots are available for simple/token_price.'}

assertions.title: Seeded bitcoin market chart remains available on fresh boot

steps.expected: 200 response with non-empty seeded chart data using the deterministic expected timestamps

assertions.title: Seeded strategy treasury transaction history remains available on fresh boot

steps.expected: 200 response with the seeded transaction list ordered from newest to oldest

frictions.description: Startup prewarm targeted /simple/price and completed, but the same surface still returns service_unavailable on a fresh boot because no shared live market snapshot exists with CCXT_EXCHANGES disabled.
frictions.resolution: Confirmed this is expected cleanup behavior by correlating /diagnostics/runtime with the explicit 503 error envelopes from /simple/price and /simple/token_price.

summary: Tested 4 misc runtime cleanup API behaviors: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
